overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character running through a rainy urban city street at night. The character navigates wet cobblestone roads past storefronts and buildings with atmospheric street lighting and reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban sidewalk with historic stone buildings

agents.ego_description: running steadily down wet cobblestone street past a mailbox and stone buildings toward a plaza with stairs

entered.detail: dark colored mailbox on the right sidewalk
historic stone building facade with large windows
single tree with no leaves in the center distance
broad stone staircase leading up to building entrance
tall modern building with illuminated windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wet cobblestone street at night, passing a mailbox and historic stone buildings. Rain falls steadily, creating reflections on the pavement under street lamps. The character approaches a wide staircase leading to a modern building ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with parked vehicles and waterfront railing

events.description: character runs past a parked car with illuminated brake lights on the left side

agents.ego_description: running past a parked car and turning right along the wet street toward the waterfront

notable_agents.action: parked car with red brake lights glowing in the rain

entered.detail: dark sedan parked at the curb with brake lights on
metal railing along the water visible in the distance
utility wires crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The character passes a parked car with glowing brake lights and turns right along the street. The modern glass building shifts to the right side of the frame as a waterfront railing becomes visible on the left. The rain continues to fall on the cobblestone surface.

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the wet street toward the illuminated Meillard storefront

entered.detail: upscale boutique with illuminated 'Meillard' signage above entrance
red fire hydrant on the right sidewalk
red brick building facade with large windows

segments.scene_description: The character runs toward the Meillard storefront, an upscale boutique with glowing signage. The street is lined with brick buildings on the left and the modern glass building recedes into the distance on the right. A red fire hydrant appears on the right sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale boutique storefront with large display windows

events.description: character stops running to stand and observe the Meillard storefront
character resumes running away from the storefront toward the waterfront

agents.ego_description: stopping to observe the Meillard storefront display windows before continuing along the street

entered.detail: large illuminated display windows with curtains and merchandise visible
green painted entrance door to the boutique
store with signage reading 'Green's Convenience Store'
black and white striped awning over store entrance

segments.scene_description: The character stops in front of the Meillard boutique to observe the illuminated display windows and green door. After a brief pause, the character continues running past a red fire hydrant toward a convenience store with a striped awning visible ahead on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with convenience store and brick buildings

events.description: passing from open waterfront area into narrower commercial street with tall brick buildings

agents.ego_description: running past the Green's Convenience Store and continuing through the narrow brick-lined street

entered.detail: tall historic brick building with multiple windows
tall illuminated building with distinctive lighting visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character runs past the Green's Convenience Store with its distinctive striped awning, entering a narrower street lined with tall brick buildings. In the distance, a tall illuminated tower becomes visible against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: alleyway opening into large urban plaza with historic architecture

events.description: narrow alley opens into wide plaza with view of distant illuminated tower and approaching vehicle

agents.ego_description: sprinting through narrow alley toward the open plaza with the distant lit building becoming more prominent

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on approaching from the distance in the plaza

entered.detail: wide open cobblestone plaza area between large buildings
ornate historic buildings lining both sides of the approaching plaza

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow alley that opens into a wide plaza. The distant illuminated tower grows larger as the character approaches. Historic buildings line the sides of the plaza, and a car with headlights on becomes visible approaching from the far end of the open area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban corridor that shifts from historic stone architecture toward a modern waterfront district. It begins with the character running along a wet cobblestone street past a mailbox and historic buildings, where steady rain creates shimmering reflections under the street lamps. As the character approaches a wide staircase and a modern building, the camera passes a parked car with glowing brake lights and turns right, causing the glass structure to shift position while a waterfront railing emerges on the left. The scene then opens up as the character runs toward the glowing signage of the Meillard boutique, with the modern building receding into the distance and brick storefronts and a red fire hydrant lining the path.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban district that transitions from intimate storefronts into a wide, open plaza. It begins with the character pausing before the illuminated display windows and green door of the Meillard boutique, before resuming a run past a red fire hydrant toward a convenience store with a striped awning. As the character passes the store, the environment shifts into a narrower street lined with tall brick buildings, where a distant illuminated tower first appears against the night sky. The scene then opens from a tight alley into a sprawling plaza flanked by historic buildings, with the tower growing larger in the frame. Finally, the camera tracks the character's approach toward the center of the open area as a car with glowing headlights emerges from the far end.
